# Q²M Silk Dryer EVO









$29.99

Experience the next level in drying technology with our Q²M Silk Dryer EVO, the ultimate silk drying towel. This revolutionary drying towel boasts an impressive GSM of 530, offering a 50% increase in total absorbency over its predecessor. The EVO variant is specially designed with reduced edges for safer and more effective use on complex-shaped panels. It's not just a drying towel; it's the best silk drying towel you'll ever use, setting new standards in performance and results.

Hurry up! Sales Ends In




*

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/f02b0fb6-fcb5-47bd-9b08-a8892a4edcd3/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/4395d908-2aaf-448f-982c-88d6019e3657/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 

# SAFE AND SMOOTH DRYING

The Q M SilkDryer EVO is a safe way to dry your car because of its advanced fiber technology. The silky-smooth gliding feature of the towel ensures a scratch and smudge-free drying process, even on the softest paintwork. Additionally, the tightly woven back of the towel stores impressive amounts of moisture, reducing the likelihood of water spots or streaks.

# DUAL SIDED MICROFIBER

This towel has two unique fibers that work together to provide unmatched drying power. The long, pointed fibers draw up water from the surface, while the tightly woven back stores impressive amounts of moisture. This makes it one of the most efficient and effective drying towels available, delivering professional-level results every time. By using the Q M SilkDryer EVO, you can maintain your car's finish to the highest standard with ease.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/9bfeec78-5c85-4c31-8a04-dd6a6e4c6af7/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 

# PRO TIP

For best results, machine wash the item using a gentle cycle and a maximum temperature of 86 F. Avoid tumble drying, ironing, or using bleach, as these can damage the delicate fibers of the product. By taking good care of your item, you can enjoy its superior quality and performance for years to come.

# PRO TIP

Ensure you clean the leather well and remove any excess of your cleaner. We highly recommend the use of one of our Q M LeatherCleaners. Make sure you proceed with a test panel before you apply the product to the whole upholstery. 
TIP: Apply the product to one panel at a time and ensure even coverage. Do not wipe off. If you see the product drying unevenly, level the product without adding any more liquid. Check after 20 minutes, if necessary - wipe.
**CONSUMPTION**: 40ml/car
**PH TOLERANCE**: pH 2-11
**DURABILITY**: >12months / 20K km

#### Q²M Silk Dryer EVO

**Redefining Drying Towel Excellence**
Prepare to embark on a journey where innovation meets performance introducing the Q M SilkDryer EVO, the epitome of drying towel evolution. As you delve into the realm of automotive care, be ready to discover a product that redefines your drying routine with its advanced features and impeccable performance. With a commitment to excellence, GYEON introduces the Q M SilkDryer EVO, setting a new standard for drying towels that outshines its predecessor and stands as a testament to the brand's dedication to delivering exceptional results.
**The Evolution of Excellence:**
The Q M SilkDryer EVO isn't just an upgrade it's a revolution. This drying towel represents the pinnacle of innovation and performance, reimagining the very concept of drying your vehicle. With a higher GSM of 530, the EVO variant stands as a testament to GYEON's unwavering commitment to excellence, outperforming its predecessor with a remarkable 50% increase in total absorbency.
**A Symphony of Advanced Features:**
**(1) Impressive Absorbency:** The heart of the Q M SilkDryer EVO lies in its unprecedented absorbency. With a higher GSM, this drying towel absorbs moisture like never before, effortlessly whisking away water droplets and ensuring a streak-free finish that enhances the appearance of your vehicle.
**(2) Enhanced Functionality:** The reduced edges of the Q M SilkDryer EVO redefine its functionality, making it even safer to use on complex-shaped panels. With improved maneuverability, this drying towel ensures that every inch of your vehicle receives the care and attention it deserves, leaving no corner untouched.
**A Product for Discerning Enthusiasts:**
**Redefining Standards:** The Q M SilkDryer EVO is tailor-made for discerning car enthusiasts who demand nothing less than perfection. This drying towel redefines the expectations of performance, delivering results that stand as a testament to your commitment to excellence.
**Elevating Your Drying Routine:**
**(1) Exceptional Performance:** Q M SilkDryer EVO isn't merely a drying towel; it's an experience that elevates your automotive care regimen. Witness the transformation as the higher GSM and increased absorbency of the EVO variant ensure that drying your vehicle becomes a swift and efficient endeavor.
**(2) Unparalleled Results:** Bid farewell to streaks and water spots as the Q M SilkDryer EVO effortlessly absorbs moisture, leaving your vehicle's surface immaculate and ready to shine. Embrace the perfection of a streak-free finish that enhances the beauty of your vehicle.
**(3) Innovative Design:** Explore the enhanced functionality of the Q M SilkDryer EVO as reduced edges make it safer and more versatile to use on various vehicle panels. Experience improved maneuverability and coverage as you dry your vehicle to perfection.
**Step into a New Era of Drying Excellence:**
Incorporate the Q M SilkDryer EVO into your automotive care routine and experience the transformation it brings to your drying experience. As you witness the higher GSM, increased absorbency, and enhanced functionality, embrace a realm where innovation meets performance, delivering a drying towel that sets a new benchmark for excellence.
Q M SilkDryer EVO a testament to GYEON's pursuit of perfection in every product, a promise of unparalleled drying performance that transcends expectations. Elevate your automotive care journey and step into a realm where evolution meets excellence, redefining the very essence of drying your vehicle to perfection.
